name: Blacksmith
description: Drop-in faster + cheaper GitHub Actions runners (~half the price of GH-hosted, gaming-CPU hardware). Switch a workflow over by changing `runs-on` to `blacksmith-*-ubuntu-*`. The Blacksmith API is for org/billing inspection; jobs themselves dispatch via GitHub Actions.

tools.name: list_organizations
tools.description: List Blacksmith organizations the token can access.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Get runner-minute usage + spend for an organization. Args: org_id, period? (current|YYYY-MM).

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List recent jobs that ran on Blacksmith runners. Args: org_id, status? (queued|in_progress|completed|failed), limit?.

tools.name: list_caches
tools.description: List Blacksmith cache entries (their faster actions/cache replacement). Args: org_id, repository?.

tools.name: delete_cache
tools.description: Evict a cache entry. Args: org_id, cache_id.
